title: Large Baby Pink Pull Bow - Ideal As Gift Wrap, Florist, Wedding Bow by APAC Packaging
features: Plain Baby Pink Decorative Pull Bow (For Assembly At Home)
Ideal For Gift Wrapping, Floristry or Wedding Decoration
Approximate Size When Made: 6" x 6" (15cm x 15cm) Ribbon Width: 2" (5cm)
To assemble the bow you need to hold the thinner ribbons in the middle & push the wider part so that it gathers & then tie a knot in the thinner ribbon to secure the bow in place.
The item comes without any retail packaging as they are not packaged individually.
